# KDD 2024

**Coverage status:** Pending

**Checked on:** 2026-07-11

**Official audit sources:** [Source 1](<https://kdd.org/kdd2024/research-track-papers/>) · [Source 2](<https://kdd.org/kdd2024/applied-data-science-track-papers/>) · [Source 3](<https://kdd.org/kdd2024/workshops/>) · [Source 4](<https://sites.google.com/view/kdd-mlf-2024/schedule>) · [Source 5](<https://kdd.org/kdd2024/special-days/>) · [Source 6](<https://ai-behavioral-science.github.io/2024>) · [Source 7](<https://biokdd.org/biokdd24/>) · [Source 8](<https://openreview.net/group?id=KDD.org/2024/Workshop/KiL#tab-accept-oral>) · [Source 9](<https://aimel.ai/kdd2024aidsh>) · [Source 10](<https://sites.google.com/g.ucla.edu/kdd-healthday/home>) · [Source 11](<https://ailab.ijs.si/dunja/EU-Day-KDD2024>) · [Source 12](<https://bigmodel.ai/aigc-kdd24/>)

**Coverage notes:** The full Research and Applied Data Science schedules were title-screened. The official side-program audit covered 39 unique entries: 31 unique workshop organizer URLs and eight special days. Thirty-two entries were resolved at paper or complete-program level; workshop remains omitted from tracks\_checked because seven exact blockers remain: the Drive-only Behavioral Bias of Vision-Language Models paper at AI Behavioral Science; the unavailable BIOKDD host; KiL's missing titles and inaccessible accepted tab; the unavailable AI and Data Science for Healthcare host; the access-controlled Health Day program; the unavailable European Data Science Day host; and Generative AI Day's empty schedule. The accepted Machine Learning in Finance candidates HLOB - Information Persistence and Structure in Limit Order Books and Higher Order Transformers: Enhancing Stock Movement Prediction On Multimodal Time-Series Data were excluded because public paper/identifier and direct-decision evidence were insufficient, not added as catalog records.

6 verified papers curated for direct relevance to quantitative finance and asset management. Tracks are separated so main-conference, position, and workshop status remains visible.

[← Back to the main index](../../README.md)

## Main Conference (4)

### [A Multimodal Foundation Agent for Financial Trading: Tool-Augmented, Diversified, and Generalist](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.18485>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-zhang-finagent-trading

**Authors:** Wentao Zhang, Lingxuan Zhao, Haochong Xia, Shuo Sun, Jiaze Sun, Molei Qin, Xinyi Li, Yuqing Zhao, Yilei Zhao, Xinyu Cai, Longtao Zheng, Xinrun Wang, Bo An

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Financial Agents · Alternative Data · Alpha Modeling

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** arXiv 2402.18485 · DOI 10.1145/3637528.3671801

**Focus:** Combines prices, news, charts, tools, memory, and reflection in an agent that trades stocks and cryptocurrencies.

**Why it matters:** Tests whether a generalist multimodal agent can turn diverse market evidence into profitable trading actions.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671801>) · [Paper](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.18485>)

---

### [FreQuant: A Reinforcement-Learning based Adaptive Portfolio Optimization with Multi-frequency Decomposition](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671668>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-jeon-frequant

**Authors:** Jihyeong Jeon, Jiwon Park, Chanhee Park, U Kang

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Portfolio Optimization · Asset Allocation

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1145/3637528.3671668

**Focus:** Decomposes stock signals across frequencies before reinforcement learning adapts portfolio allocations to market shifts.

**Why it matters:** Uses persistent and transient return components to improve portfolio value and annualized performance.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671668>) · [Paper](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671668>)

---

### [MacroHFT: Memory Augmented Context-aware Reinforcement Learning On High Frequency Trading](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.14537>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-zong-macrohft

**Authors:** Chuqiao Zong, Chaojie Wang, Molei Qin, Lei Feng, Xinrun Wang, Bo An

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Execution · Market Regimes

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** arXiv 2406.14537 · DOI 10.1145/3637528.3672064

**Focus:** Mixes context-specialized reinforcement-learning agents with memory to trade cryptocurrency at minute frequency.

**Why it matters:** Adapts high-frequency policies to changing trend and volatility regimes while preserving profitability.

**Notes:** The KDD schedule renders Qin Molei; ACM and DBLP metadata use Molei Qin.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3672064>) · [Paper](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.14537>)

---

### [Money Never Sleeps: Maximizing Liquidity Mining Yields in Decentralized Finance](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671942>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-ni-defi-liquidity-mining

**Authors:** Wangze Ni, Yiwei Zhao, Weijie Sun, Lei Chen, Peng Cheng, Chen Jason Zhang, Xuemin Lin

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Asset Allocation · Portfolio Optimization

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1145/3637528.3671942

**Focus:** Allocates cryptocurrency capital among decentralized-finance liquidity pools to maximize mining yield.

**Why it matters:** Formalizes yield farming as a dynamic allocation problem with executable pool-selection decisions.

**Notes:** The KDD schedule renders Zhao Yiwei and Chen Zhang; ACM and DBLP metadata use Yiwei Zhao and Chen Jason Zhang.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671942>) · [Paper](<https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671942>)

## Workshops (2)

### [FuNVol: A Multi-Asset Market Simulator using Functional Principal Components and Neural SDEs](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.00859>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-choudhary-funvol

**Authors:** Vedant Choudhary, Sebastian Jaimungal, Maxime Bergeron

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Workshop · Oral

**Subvenue:** Machine Learning in Finance

**Status / verified:** Accepted · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Market Simulation · Derivatives · Risk Management

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** arXiv 2303.00859

**Focus:** Simulates arbitrage-consistent multi-asset implied-volatility surfaces with functional components and neural stochastic differential equations.

**Why it matters:** Produces realistic cross-asset option scenarios whose quality is tested through delta-hedging profit-and-loss distributions.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://sites.google.com/view/kdd-mlf-2024/schedule#:~:text=FuNVol%3A%20A%20Multi-Asset%20Market%20Simulator>) · [Paper](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.00859>)

---

### [Sourcing Investment Targets for Venture and Growth Capital Using Multivariate Time Series Transformer](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.16888>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-kdd-cao-investment-target-sourcing

**Authors:** Lele Cao, Gustaf Halvardsson, Andrew McCornack, Vilhelm von Ehrenheim, Pawel Herman

**Venue / year:** KDD · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Workshop · Oral

**Subvenue:** Machine Learning in Finance

**Status / verified:** Accepted · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Alternative Data · Alpha Modeling · Asset Allocation

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** arXiv 2309.16888

**Focus:** Ranks prospective venture and growth-capital investments from multivariate company time series with a Transformer.

**Why it matters:** Turns proprietary operating histories into target-sourcing decisions and validates them with real investment portfolio simulations.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://sites.google.com/view/kdd-mlf-2024/schedule#:~:text=Sourcing%20Investment%20Targets%20for%20Venture%20and%20Growth%20Capital>) · [Paper](<https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.16888>)
